name: Helena West Helena Trnsprtn
registry_source: Arkansas SOS (sos.arkansas.gov) - no matching corporate entity located
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found for 'Helena West Helena Trnsprtn'. SAFER keyword searches for 'HELENA WEST HELENA' and 'HELENA WEST' returned zero matches. The address 535 Oakland Ave, Helena, AR 72342 appears to correspond to the Helena-West Helena School District administrative offices / bus garage (per Cylex listing) rather than an independent for-hire carrier - i.e. this is likely the in-house pupil transportation operation of the Helena-West Helena School District (Phillips County, AR), which would not require its own USDOT and would not file as a private corporation with the AR Secretary of State (it is a public school district governmental entity). No Arkansas SOS corporate filing for an entity named 'Helena West Helena Transportation' identified.
